comments.author: @Bethlehem1984
comments.text: I knew about Cabo Verde only after the 2026 FIFA games, the country and it’s people are absolutely fascinating, I wish I can visit it one day, I also loved their music😊

comments.author: @EntBynd
comments.text: Who came here after Current rounds of Football in FIFA 2026

comments.author: @RemoteEarthJourneys
comments.text: I came for the beaches and volcanoes, but stayed for the story of the people. Cape Verde feels like one of those places that changes the way you see the world.

replies.author: @WorldTravelDoc
replies.text: It’s truly a special place, and we’re so glad the stories of the local people resonated with you! 🇨🇻✨

comments.author: @thedarkgoatstory
comments.text: Beautiful place! Want to travel there one time

replies.author: @WorldTravelDoc
replies.text: We hope you get the chance to visit this paradise soon! ✨
